portBehavior.detail: Conflict was detected with actionable remediation; the unrelated owner remained alive. After release, the harness acquired 17871 and reacquired it on restart.

observations.diagnostic: PORT_CONFLICT: Port 17871 is already in use. Stop the unrelated process that owns 17871, then retry. The harness refused dynamic fallback and did not terminate the owner.
